user.title: Add Shark IQ Vacuum
user.description: Add one Shark IQ vacuum at a time. Run this flow again to add more vacuums. Assign each vacuum a static IP in your router first.

data.name: Name (e.g. Downstairs Shark)
data.mapping: Mapping (leave default unless you know otherwise)

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the vacuum at that IP. Make sure it's on and on the same network.
error.unknown: Unexpected error talking to the vacuum. Check Home Assistant logs.

init.title: Shark IQ Vacuum options
init.description: How often to poll the vacuum for status updates. Faster polling means fresher battery level and quicker response in the UI; slower polling means less network traffic. 30s is the recommended default. Range: 5–600 seconds.
